coach_notes: The most critical gaps are classroom management, lesson planning, and early childhood education, as these are foundational skills for design roles in educational or child-focused settings. Without them, you cannot effectively create user-centered designs for young learners or manage collaborative design processes. To address this, take a short course in instructional design or child development, and volunteer to design educational materials for a non-profit to build relevant experience.
